case_title: KENNY TSENG VS. CHIA JI NEI

docket_entries.description: NOTICE OF APPEAL FILED BY APPELLANT NEI, CHIA JI MAILED TO RESPONDENT TSENG, KENNY
RECORD REMANDED TO SMALL CLAIMS (EXHIBITS RETURNED TO SMALL CLAIMS DIVISION)
SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF DEC-15-2008 IS CONTINUED STIPULATION OF THE PARTIES TO JAN-22-2009 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. DEFENDANT WAIVES SERVICE. DEFENDANT TO BRING ALL FINANCIAL DOCUMENTS.
SC-105 REQUEST FOR COURT ORDER & ANSWER(SMALL CLAIMS) FILED BY PLAINTIFF TSENG, KENNY AS TO DEFENDANT NEI, CHIA JI
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED FEB-01-2010 ORDERED DESTROYED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $40.00) SERVED FEB-26-2008, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT NEI, CHIA JI

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TSENG, KENNY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT NEI, CHIA JI $4,800.00 PRINCIPAL, $115.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,915.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
NOTICE OF FILING NOTICE OF APPEAL RETURNED UNDELIVERED. SENT TO PLAINTIFF.

SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF MAR-19-2009 IS CONTINUED TO APR-16-2009 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT. 506 PER COURT ORDER, PRO TEM COMMISSIONER PENELOPE PAHL. DEFENDANT IS ORDERED TO MAKE PAYMENTS ON THIS JUDGMENT OF $550 PER MO. STARTING 4/1/09 & CONTINUE THE 1ST OF EACH MONTH UP TO 11/1/09. DEFENDANT WILL THEN MAKE A FINAL PAYMENT OF $720 FOR A TOTAL OF $5120. THIS SUM BEING THE JUDGMENT AMOUNT OF $4800 PLUS INTEREST AT THE STATUTORY RATE OF 10% FROM JULY 2008 TO MARCH 2009. THIS CASE SHALL BE SET FOR PROGRESS REPORT ON 4/16/09 AT 11:00AM; JULY 16, 2009; OCT. 15, 2009 & FINALLY DEC. 10, 2009. IF THE AMOUNT IS BEING PAID IN A TIMELY MANNER, NO APPEARANCES ARE REQUIRED ON DEC. 10, 2009. THE CLERK SHALL ENTER A SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT. IF ANY PAYMENT IS NOT MADE WHEN DUE, THE FULL AMOUNT REMAINING SHALL IMMEDIATELY BECOME DUE. SEE ORDER ON FILE FOR FURTHER INSTRUCTION.

SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF JUL-16-2009 IS CONTINUED STIPULATION OF THE PARTIES TO OCT-15-2009 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. DEFENDANT IS PAYING AS AGREED. CONTINUE TO DEC. 10, 2009 FOR PROGRESS REPORT. IF FULLY PAID, NO APPEARANCE REQUIRED.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,650.00 FILED BY TSENG, KENNY AS TO DEFENDANT NEI, CHIA JI ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-30-2008 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT
ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED AS TO APPELLANT NEI, CHIA JI HEARING SET FOR SEP-29-2008 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF FEB-09-2009 IS CONTINUED STIPULATION OF THE PARTIES TO MAR-09-2009 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. DEFENDANT TO BRING INTERPRETER AND FINANCIAL INFORMATION.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-30-2008 - JUDGMENT.

SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF MAR-12-2009 IS CONTINUED TO MAR-19-2009 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT. 506 PER COURT ORDER. DEFENDANT TO COME WITH ALL FINANCIAL DOCUMENTS. DEFENDANT TO BRING INTERPRETER.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-19-2009 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-19-2009 BY JUDGE PRO TEM: PENELOPE PAHL. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RETAINED. COURT CERTIFIED MANDARIN INTERPRETER TOM LAM PRESENT ON DEFENDANT'S BEHALF. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).

SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF APR-16-2009 IS CONTINUED PER STIPULATION OF THE PARTIES TO JUL-16-2009 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT. 506 FOR PROGRESS REPORT. NEXT CONTINUANCE IS OCT. 15, 2009 AND DEC. 10, 2009. IF AMOUNTS ARE PAID IN A TIMELY MANNER, NO APPEARANCES ARE REQUIRED ON DEC. 10, 2009.
SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF DEC-10-2009 IS OFF CALENDAR - JUDGMENT FULLY PAID PER TERMS STATED IN ROA.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-30-2008 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-30-2008 BY PAUL SLAVIT. ALL PARTIES PRESENT. EXHIBITS FROM BOTH SIDES RETAINED. PLAINTIFF'S DAUGHTER REBECCA TSENG INTERPRETS ENGLISH/CANTONESE - CANTONESE/ENGLISH ON HIS BEHALF. DEFENDANT'S FRIEND MANDY CHU INTERPRETS ENGLISH/MANDARIN - MANDARIN/ENGLISH ON HIS BEHALF. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
STIPULATION TO USE JUDGE PRO TEM AND ORDER FILED BY NEI, CHIA JI TSENG, KENNY
SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL CALENDAR OF JUL-02-2008 - JUDGMENT ENTERED. (CLERK-BETH WILBER, 525)

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT RESPONDENT TSENG, KENNY RECOVER FROM APPELLANT NEI, CHIA JI $4,750.00 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,800.00 NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND CERTIFICATE OF MAILING FILED
SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF SEP-29-2008 IS CONTINUED TO DEC-15-2008 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT. 506, FOR PROOF OF SERVICE.
SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF JAN-22-2009 IS CONTINUED STIPULATION OF THE PARTIES TO FEB-09-2009 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. DEFENDANT TO BRING INTERPRETER AND ALL FINANCIALS.

SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF MAR-09-2009 IS CONTINUED TO MAR-12-2009 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. DEFENDANT HAS APPEARED AGAIN WITHOUT AN INTERPRETER. PLAINTIFF HAS ADVISED THE DEFENDANT THAT CASE IS CONTINUED TO MAR 12, 2009 AT 11:00 AM FOR OEX AND HE MUST APPEAR WITH AN INTERPRETER.
SC-105 (ANSWER) TO REQUEST FOR COURT ORDER AND ANSWER (SMALL CLAIMS) FILED BY DEFENDANT NEI, CHIA JI AS TO PLAINTIFF TSENG, KENNY
SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF OCT-15-2009 IS CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO DEC-10-2009 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. CONTINUE FOR PROGRESS REPORT.

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Jul-02-2008 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: 9:15am
Small Claims appeals, Judge Pro Tem Robert Stump, nothing on record, clerk-Beth Wilber.
Cause called for small claims appeals: Appellant Chia Ji Nei, appearing in Pro Per; Respondent Kenny Tseng appearing in Pro Per.
Mandy Chu appeas with Chia Ji Nei, to act as his informal Mandarin interpreter. Appearing with Mr. Nei is his daugther Rebecca Tseng. Parties previously sworn testify in the narrative. After questions from Judge Stump, matter is submitted. No new evidence was marked or retained by the Court.
9:40am
Matter is submitted

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar May-08-2008 Judgment Entered
